locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

relations.subject: Plumbeous-crowned tyrannulet
relations.evidence: It inhabits the interior and edges of humid montane forest in the subtropical and tropical zones
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Plumbeous-crowned tyrannulet
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon in Colombia, "scarce (but easy to overlook, and doubtless underrecorded)" in Ecuador, and "rare to uncommon but probably overlooked; locally may be fairly common" in Peru. "As a species that depends upon forest, Plumbeous-crowned Tyrannulet potentially is at risk from human activities that destroy or degrade forests, such as expanding agriculture, mining, road construction, and logging"
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
